# KAIROS

**The operational infrastructure for autonomous systems.**

When autonomous systems act — on code, capital, infrastructure, decisions — the world needs to know what happened, why it happened, and how to replay it.

Kairos is building the operational memory, governance, and control layer that makes autonomous execution trustworthy at scale.

---

### Kairos Trace — Live now

**Operational memory for autonomous systems.**

Record and replay every autonomous action: every prompt, tool call, decision, policy check, and failure.

```bash
npm install kairos-sdk
pip install kairos-trace
```

[Dashboard](https://withkairos.dev/app) · [Docs](https://withkairos.dev/docs) · [Quick Start](https://github.com/withkairos/kairos#quick-start)

---

### Platform

| Product | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **Kairos Trace** | Operational memory for autonomous systems | Live |
| Kairos Control | Governance, policy, and approval | Next |
| Kairos Runtime | Execution environments at scale | Planned |
| Kairos Grid | Multi-agent coordination | Planned |
| Kairos Sim | Adversarial simulation | Future |

---

### Integrations

Works with LangChain, OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, and any Python or TypeScript agent.

---

*Kairos — Operational infrastructure for autonomous systems.*
